label: human
base_text:
Q:

Configuring Apache solr 4.5.1 with Godaddy Shared hosting and VPS server

I have installed Apache Solr on a VPS server and my Drupal 7 application currently running in a Godaddy shared hosting. When I tested the connection with my local machine which is running under XAMPP (Windows environment), the connection are creating without any issue. However when I put the same configuration on my Godaddy shared hosting it saying 

"Your site was unable to connect the Apache Solr server". Is there any issue with Godaddy shared hosting to connect with Apache Solr? Or, something special is required to connect with Solr which is present in local XAMPP but not in shared Godaddy server? Your help is highly appropriated. A:

As stated in the comments, GoDaddy probably does not allow external connections on other ports than 80 or 443.
final_text:
Q:

I have installed Apache Solr on a VPS server and my Drupal 7 application currently running in a Godaddy shared hosting. When I tested the connection with my local machine which is running under XAMPP (Windows environment), the connection are creating without any issue. However when I put the same configuration on my Godaddy shared hosting it saying 

"Your site was unable to connect the Apache Solr server". Is there any issue with Godaddy shared hosting to connect with Apache Solr? Or, something specail is required to connect with Solr which is present in local XAMPP but not in shared Godaddy server? Your help is highly appropriated. A:

As stated in the comments, GoDaddy probably does not allow external connections on other ports than 80 or 443.

base_text: Let us look at a few women celebrities and their favorite liquid diets. Beyonce Knowles, in order to lose 20 pounds for a role in the musical called “Dreamgirls”, jumped into the liquid diet bandwagon. She picked a drink made of lemon juice, maple syrup, cayenne pepper and water. This is also known as the Maple Syrup diet and restricts the calorie intake from 600-1300 per day for 14 days. Salma Hayek, the actress of Spanish origin is a big fan of what is known as the Cooler cleanse. This helps her manage her weight.
final_text: Let us look at a few women celebrities and their favorite liquid diets.
